name: cry-foodm
accumulator: mult / j.mult starts at 40 (config.extra.mult); decrements each round (end_of_round), self-destructs when rounds_remaining hits 0; replenished by selling jolly jokers (selling_card context)
notes: +j.mult Mult; perishable M-pool joker; same mult-accumulator-read pattern as j_green_joker; default mult=40; Oracle: Pair of aces + foodm @mult=40 → 1344

name: cry-mstack
accumulator: n / j.n = card.ability.extra.retriggers (default 1, integer); gains +1 per 3 jolly jokers sold (selling_card context); immutable max 40
notes: +j.n retriggers per scored played card; M-pool joker; j.n=1 by default; same repetition pattern as j_cry_iterum but variable count; Oracle: Pair of aces + mstack @n=1 → 108

name: cry-biggestm
accumulator: n / j.n is a boolean flag (0=inactive, 1=active); set to 1 in the 'before' pass when scoring_name matches config.extra.type (Pair); reset to 0 at end_of_round. x / j.x = card.ability.extra.x_mult (default 7)
notes: X(j.x=7) Mult when the joker was activated this hand (Pair scored); j.n gate models the runtime check flag; same n-guard pattern as j_cry_happyhouse; Oracle: Pair of aces + biggestm @x=7,n=1 → 448

name: cry-longboi
accumulator: x / j.x = card.ability.extra.monster; initialized from G.GAME.monstermult at equip time (starts 1); scales +bonus(0.75) per end_of_round via G.GAME.monstermult; same > 1.0 guard as j_cry_m
notes: X(G.GAME.monstermult) Mult; M-pool joker; monster value read from runtime global at equip but stored in j.x; identical branch shape to j_cry_m (xMultMod = j.x when x > 1.0); Oracle: Pair of aces + longboi @x=2.0 → 128

name: cry-Number Blocks
accumulator: money; +money_mod per held card matching the round's target rank (individual/held context); paid out via calc_dollar_bonus at end of round
notes: Economy joker: SMODS.scale_card increments card.ability.extra.money in context.individual/cardarea==G.hand for the target rank card; calc_dollar_bonus returns that money. No chips/mult/xmult produced during evaluate_play.

name: cry-Double Scale
notes: Has no calculate function at all. Uses calc_scaling hook to intercept SMODS.scale_card calls on other jokers and double (or accelerate) their scalar increment. Purely a scaling-rate modifier, emits no chips/mult/xmult during evaluate_play.

name: cry-Nostalgic Candy
notes: Sell-triggered: context.selling_self calls G.hand:change_size(+3). No scoring output whatsoever; effect is a permanent hand-size increase on sale.

name: cry-circus
notes: For each other joker being evaluated, returns X2/X3/X4/X20 XMult based on that joker's rarity (rare/cry_epic/legendary/cry_exotic). Base values from circus_rarities: rare=2, cry_epic=3, legendary=4, cry_exotic=20. The per-rarity xmult values are stored in card.ability.extra (scalable at runtime), so live values may differ from base; medium confidence because FJoker has no per-rarity field, engine uses base config.extra values.

name: cry-caramel
notes: Gives X1.75 Mult to every scored played card (context.individual, cardarea==G.play). Self-destructs after 11 rounds via end_of_round countdown — that lifecycle is non-scoring. Base x_mult from config.extra = 1.75 (modest variant uses 1.5).

name: cry-Sob
notes: Creates Negative Absolute Eternal Obelisk jokers on add_to_deck and in numerous non-scoring contexts (selling, discarding, rerolling, buying, skipping, using consumables, etc.). Returns card_eval_status_text only. No chips/mult/xmult produced during evaluate_play.

name: cry-Bonus Joker
notes: When a played Bonus-enhancement card is scored (individual/cardarea==G.play), 1-in-8 chance to increase joker or consumable slot limit by 1, up to 2 times per round. No chips/mult/xmult returned; effect is deck-meta slot expansion only.

name: cry-Mult Joker
notes: When a played Mult-enhancement card is scored (individual/cardarea==G.play), 1-in-3 chance to create a Cryptid spectral consumable (if room). Returns nil,true or nothing; no chips/mult/xmult produced during evaluate_play.

name: cry-gold Joker
accumulator: n; +percent_mod (=2) per scored Gold-enhancement card (individual/cardarea==G.play via SMODS.scale_card on card.ability.extra.percent); paid out as percentage-of-gold dollars via calc_dollar_bonus at end of round
notes: Economy joker: SMODS.scale_card increments card.ability.extra.percent by 2 each time a played Gold card is scored. calc_dollar_bonus pays out floor(0.01 * percent * current_dollars). No chips/mult/xmult produced during evaluate_play.

name: cry-altgoogol
notes: Only fires on context.selling_self; duplicates the leftmost joker card. No chips/mult/xmult emitted during evaluate_play.

name: cry-soccer (One For All)
notes: No calculate() at all; effect is entirely in add_to_deck/remove_from_deck (grants +1 joker slot, consumable slot, hand size, booster slot, voucher slot). No scoring output.

name: cry-fleshpanopticon (Flesh Panopticon)
notes: Fires on context.setting_blind (multiplies boss blind chip requirement by 20) and context.end_of_round (self-destructs, creates a Negative Gateway consumable). Neither context is part of evaluate_play scoring.

name: cry-Spectrogram
kotlin:
// retrigger_joker_check guard in calcJoker:
"j_cry_spectrogram" -> if (rj === ctx.board.lastOrNull() && j.n > 0) return Fx().apply { repetitions = j.n }
accumulator: n; increments by 1 for each Echo-enhanced (m_cry_echo) card that is scored in the per-card pass. No-op until m_cry_echo is added to the Enhancement enum — j.n will always be 0.
notes: Retriggers the rightmost board joker j.n times where n = count of Echo-enhanced cards scored this hand. Engine-side: wire in per-card pass when m_cry_echo is added to Enhancement enum. Retrigger dispatch implemented; accumulator hook left as TODO comment.

name: cry-jtron
notes: Returns Emult_mod = 1 + bonus * (number of j_joker copies in play); config.extra.bonus=1. The count of j_joker is dynamic run-state not available in FJoker fields, so kotlin is best-effort. At base with 0 j_jokers present, eMult=1 (no-op); with N copies eMult=1+N.

name: cry-clockwork
accumulator: x; +0.25 (xmult_mod) every 3rd hand played (tracked via immutable counter c2 in context.before)
notes: Has four effects: (1) joker_main xmult (scales up +0.25 every 3rd hand, config.extra.xmult starts at 1.0); (2) held/individual steel card xmult (steelenhc starts at 1.0, +0.1 every 7th hand); (3) repetition retrigger for held steel cards every 2nd hand; (4) before: set first full-hand card to steel every 5th hand. Only joker_main xmult branch is represented here; steelenhc held-card xmult and repetition branches also score but require separate dispatch entries not shown.

name: cry-demicolon
notes: Fires on context.joker_main but calls Cryptid.forcetrigger on the next joker to the right (index i+1), propagating that joker's own scoring output. Does not directly emit chips/mult/xmult/eMult itself; it is a joker-trigger relay, not a direct scoring source. Disabled in modest and mainline gamesets.

name: cry-starfruit
accumulator: x; -0.2 (emult_mod) on each shop reroll (context.reroll_shop); self-destructs when emult reaches <=1. Starts at config.emult=2.0.
notes: Returns Emult_mod = card.ability.emult (starts at 2.0, decrements by 0.2 on each shop reroll via SMODS.scale_card; self-destructs at <=1). Engine reads j.x for the accumulated emult value. reroll_shop is non-scoring; joker_main is the scoring branch.

name: cry-sundail (Sundial)
notes: Fires on context.before (decrements handleft counter via SMODS.scale_card) and context.selling_self (if handleft<1, sets G.GAME.sundial=true permanently and banishes itself). No chips/mult/xmult emitted during evaluate_play; effect is a sell-to-activate passive modifier.

name: cry-kittyprinter
notes: Flat X2 Xmult every hand. config.extra.Xmult=2. Wired in batch-15; oracle 88/88.

name: cry-Clicked Cookie
accumulator: chips; starts at 200, decremented by chip_mod(1) on each cry_press click event (non-scoring UI context)
notes: Flat +chips in joker_main equal to j.chips (starts 200, decreases 1 per click). Wired in batch-15; oracle 88/88.

name: cry-Monkey Dagger
accumulator: chips; +10 * sell_cost of joker immediately to the left (which is destroyed) at setting_blind
notes: Scaling +Chips dagger. On setting_blind destroys left joker and adds +10*sell_cost to j.chips. No-op until first kill (starts at 0). Wired in batch-15; oracle 88/88.

name: cry-Unjust Dagger
accumulator: x; +0.2 * sell_cost of joker immediately to the left (which is destroyed) at setting_blind
notes: Scaling Xmult dagger. On setting_blind destroys left joker and adds +0.2*sell_cost to x_mult (j.x). No-op until first kill (starts at 1). Wired in batch-15; oracle 88/88.

name: cry-Jimball
accumulator: x; multiplied by x_mult_mod(0.15) each context.before when this hand type has been played fewer times than every other hand type (resets to 1.0 if any other type ties/exceeds); starts at 1
notes: Scaling Xmult read at joker_main; accumulator scales up in context.before when this hand type is least-played, resets otherwise. Wired in batch-15; oracle 88/88.

name: cry-pizza_slice
accumulator: x; +0.5 per other pizza_slice sold (context.selling_card with key==j_cry_pizza_slice); starts at 1
notes: Fires Xmult_mod=j.x in joker_main; x_mult starts at 1 and grows +0.5 each time another pizza_slice is sold. Typically spawned by j_cry_pizza. Wired in batch-15; oracle 88/88.

name: cry-Wheelhope
accumulator: x; +0.5 per Wheel of Fortune pseudorandom_result trigger (context.pseudorandom_result with identifier=="wheel_of_fortune"); starts at 1
notes: Scaling Xmult read at joker_main; x_mult grows +0.5 each time Wheel of Fortune fires. Accumulation is non-scoring (probability hook). Wired in batch-15; oracle 88/88.

name: cry-fspinner
accumulator: chips; +6 per context.before trigger when another hand type has been played at least as many times as the current hand type (SMODS.scale_card, scalar_value=chip_mod=6); starts at 0
notes: Accumulates +Chips in context.before (not individual/joker_main directly); joker_main reads j.chips if non-zero. Wired in batch-15; oracle 88/88.

name: cry-Pirate Dagger
accumulator: xc; +0.25 * sell_cost of joker immediately to the right (which is destroyed) at setting_blind; starts at 1
notes: Scaling X-Chips dagger. On setting_blind destroys right joker and adds +0.25*sell_cost to x_chips (j.xc). joker_main returns xChipMod=j.xc when >1. Translations JSON classified this non-scoring because xChipMod wasn't in Fx yet; now wired. Oracle 88/88.

name: cry-stronghold
notes: X5 Xmult when scored hand is cry_Bulwark. CRY_BULWARK added to HandType enum as stub; dispatch dormant until Cryptid hand evaluation is ported. config.extra.Xmult=5.

name: cry-wtf
notes: X10 Xmult when scored hand is cry_Clusterfuck. CRY_CLUSTERFUCK added to HandType enum as stub; dormant until Cryptid hand evaluation ported. config.extra.Xmult=10.

name: cry-clash
notes: X12 Xmult when scored hand is cry_UltPair. CRY_ULTPAIR added to HandType enum as stub; dormant until Cryptid hand evaluation ported. config.extra.Xmult=12.

name: cry-the
notes: X2 Xmult when scored hand is cry_None. Uses context.scoring_name direct comparison in Lua (not poker_hands table). CRY_NONE added to HandType enum; dormant until ported. config.extra.Xmult=2.

name: cry-annihalation
notes: Lua fires Emult=5.2 (Cryptid exponential mult) not standard Xmult when scored hand is cry_WholeDeck; approximated as xMultMod=5.2 (loses power-mult semantic). CRY_WHOLEDECK added to HandType enum; dormant until ported. config.extra.emult=5.2.

name: cry-Words Cant Even
notes: X52000000 Xmult when scored hand is cry_WholeDeck. Uses Xmult_mod in Lua. Dormant until CRY_WHOLEDECK hand evaluation ported. config.extra.xmult=52000000.

name: cry-Bonkers Joker
notes: +20 Mult when scored hand is cry_Bulwark. HandType.CRY_BULWARK added as stub; dormant until ported. config.extra.mult=20.

name: cry-Fucked-Up Joker
notes: +37 Mult when scored hand is cry_Clusterfuck. HandType.CRY_CLUSTERFUCK stub; dormant until ported. config.extra.mult=37.

name: cry-Foolhardy Joker
notes: +42 Mult when scored hand is cry_UltPair. HandType.CRY_ULTPAIR stub; dormant until ported. config.extra.mult=42.

name: cry-undefined Joker
notes: +5 Mult when scored hand is cry_None. HandType.CRY_NONE stub; dormant until ported. config.extra.mult=5.

name: cry-Adroit Joker
notes: +170 Chips when scored hand is cry_Bulwark. HandType.CRY_BULWARK stub; dormant until ported. config.extra.t_chips=170.

name: cry-Penetrating Joker
notes: +270 Chips when scored hand is cry_Clusterfuck. HandType.CRY_CLUSTERFUCK stub; dormant until ported. config.extra.t_chips=270.

name: cry-Treacherous Joker
notes: +300 Chips when scored hand is cry_UltPair. HandType.CRY_ULTPAIR stub; dormant until ported. config.extra.t_chips=300.

name: cry-Nebulous Joker
notes: +30 Chips when scored hand is cry_None. Uses context.scoring_name not poker_hands check. HandType.CRY_NONE stub; dormant until ported. config.extra.t_chips=30.

name: cry-Many Lost Minds
notes: +8.0658175e67 Chips (52!) when scored hand is cry_WholeDeck. HandType.CRY_WHOLEDECK stub; dormant until ported. config.extra.chips=8.0658175e67.

name: cry-Verisimile
accumulator: x; incremented by denominator each pseudorandom_result hit; joker_main reads accumulated x_mult when >1
notes: Scaling Xmult joker; x_mult grows each time a probabilistic effect fires via context.pseudorandom_result. Pattern matches dropshot/keychange accumulator-read group. Wired in batch-16.

name: cry-Duplicare
accumulator: x; +Xmult_mod(1) per post_trigger or per individual card played (non-scoring); joker_main reads j.x when >1
notes: Scaling Xmult joker; accumulates via post_trigger context each time any joker fires a probability trigger. Pattern matches standard accumulator-read group. Wired in batch-16.

name: cry-Formidiulosus
accumulator: x; Emult = 1 + 0.01*candy_count computed in update() hook (non-scoring); joker_main reads j.x as eMult when >1
notes: Emult joker; j.x stores 1 + 0.01*candy_joker_count updated each frame. joker_main applies mult^j.x when j.x>1. Wired in batch-16 alongside stella_mortis (same eMult read pattern).

name: cry-Happy House
accumulator: n; set to 1 (truthy) when immutable.check counter exceeds the 114-hand trigger; j.n is pre-set externally before score() call
notes: Emult=4 applied at joker_main once 114 hands have been played (tracked by immutable.check). j.n > 0 is the fired gate. Wired in batch-16; oracle case: Pair of aces + happyhouse @n=1 → 512 (2^4 * 32).

name: cry-crustulum
accumulator: chips; +chip_mod(4) per reroll_shop (non-scoring, outside evaluate_play)
notes: Chips accumulate via SMODS.scale_card on reroll_shop; joker_main reads j.chips and emits +Chips. Starts at 0 so guard j.chips>0 matches Lua to_big check.

name: cry-primus
accumulator: x (proxy for Emult); +0.17 per hand played where every card in full_hand has id 2,3,5,7 or 14 (before context, non-scoring)
notes: Lua accumulates card.ability.extra.Emult (starts 1.01, +0.17 per qualifying before-hand). FJoker has no dedicated Emult field; mapping to j.x since xMult is not otherwise used. Scaling context is context.before in cardarea==jokers — non-scoring. joker_main applies eMult when Emult>1.

name: cry-Scalae
notes: Purely a meta-scaling joker: end_of_round grows its own scale counter, and calc_scaling hook modifies other jokers' scalar rates using a power-law formula. No joker_main/individual/held/repetition scoring branch exists.

name: cry-Stella Mortis
accumulator: x (proxy for Emult); +0.4 per planet card destroyed at ending_shop (non-scoring)
notes: Lua accumulates card.ability.extra.Emult (starts 1, +Emult_mod=0.4 per planet destroyed in ending_shop). FJoker has no dedicated Emult field; mapped to j.x. joker_main fires when Emult>1 and applies eMult (mult^eMult). Accumulation context is ending_shop — non-scoring.

name: cry-Circulus Pistoris
kotlin: if (ctx.handsLeft == 3) return Fx().apply { xChipMod = Math.PI; eMult = Math.PI }
notes: Fires when hands_left == 3 (Lua: hands_left >= hands_remaining(3) && < hands_remaining+1). Lua's Echip_mod maps to xChipMod (X-chips) and Emult_mod maps to eMult. Values are fixed at math.pi (~3.14159). handsLeft in Sctx is post-decrement so ctx.handsLeft==3 matches. Does not fire if the joker has cry_oversat edition (tau=2*pi) — edition variant not modeled here.

name: Ace Aequilibrium
notes: Fires in context.before (cardarea==jokers): creates negative-edition joker cards and emplaces them into G.jokers. Pure card-generation economy effect, no chips/mult/xmult emitted during evaluate_play.

name: cry-facile
accumulator: x (proxy for Emult=3, fixed); condition: fires only if scored-card count this hand <= check(10); check2 counter is runtime state reset each joker_main trigger
notes: Lua increments check2 in context.individual per played card, then joker_main fires Emult=3 (fixed, from config.extra) only if check2 <= check(10), then resets check2. FJoker has no check2 field; in practice most scoring hands have <=5 cards so condition nearly always holds. eMult=3 is constant; mapped to j.x=3.0 as proxy. Needs engine-side transient counter for full fidelity.

name: cry-Gemino
notes: end_of_round only — calls Cryptid.manipulate to upgrade the first joker in the jokers area (doubles its value); no joker_main/individual/held/repetition branch

name: cry-Energia
notes: tag_added context only — duplicates any added tag up to max_tags (40); SMODS.scale_card increments extra.tags each trigger; pure economy/meta effect, never fires during evaluate_play

name: cry-verisimile
accumulator: x; += context.denominator per pseudorandom_result win (probability-event context outside evaluate_play)
notes: config.extra.xmult starts at 1; grows by the probability denominator each time a probability result fires (pseudorandom_result context, not during scoring); joker_main reads j.x and applies as Xmult; low confidence on exact denominator increment since pseudorandom_result is a Cryptid-specific context whose value is run-dependent

name: cry-duplicare
accumulator: x; += Xmult_mod (=1.0 base) per scored play card (individual context) AND per other-joker probability trigger (post_trigger context); additive SMODS.scale_card with default '+' op
notes: config.extra = {Xmult=1, Xmult_mod=1}; individual branch during scoring calls SMODS.scale_card to add Xmult_mod to Xmult (no return, state-mutation only); joker_main fires when Xmult>1 and returns Xmult_mod key (=current Xmult) as Xmult; j.x maps to extra.Xmult; confidence medium because post_trigger scaling path is Cryptid-specific and duplicare's Xmult_mod is fixed at 1 in base config

name: cry-Rescribere
notes: selling_card context only — monkey-patches calculate_joker on all other jokers to also invoke the sold joker's calculate logic; meta card-manipulation effect, no joker_main/individual/held/repetition path

name: cry-Formidiulosus
accumulator: n; = count of cry_candy jokers on board (read from Cryptid.advanced_find_joker in the update() hook each frame, not set during evaluate_play)
notes: config.extra = {Emult_mod=0.01, Emult=1}; Emult is recomputed every frame as 1 + 0.01 * #cry_candy_jokers; joker_main returns Emult_mod key (=Emult value) as eMult (mult^eMult) when Emult>1; j.n holds the candy count; confidence medium because cry_candy count is run-state not tracked by the engine; also spawns cry_candy jokers on ending_shop and buying cry_cursed jokers (non-scoring side effects)

name: cry-Caeruleum
notes: monkey-patches SMODS.calculate_individual_effect in init() to redirect chip-type effects (a_chips/a_xchips/a_powchips) from adjacent jokers; calculate fires on context.before/after to tag adjacent jokers with cry_caeruleum flag; no joker_main/individual/held/repetition scoring branch

name: cry-jollysus Joker
notes: Creates copies of itself when selling jokers (selling_card), selling itself (selling_self), or on forcetrigger; resets spawn flag at end_of_round. No joker_main/individual/repetition/held branch — purely a card-creation economy joker.

name: cry-bubblem
notes: Fires in context.before (cardarea==G.jokers, before scoring begins): if Three of a Kind is in poker_hands, destroys itself and creates a Foil Jolly Joker (j_jolly). The before context does not add chips/mult/xmult; this is a card-creation/destruction effect, not a scoring branch.

name: cry-foodm
accumulator: mult; initial 40, decremented (self-destructs after 2 rounds via end_of_round countdown, extended by selling Jolly Jokers)
notes: joker_main gives +mult equal to j.mult (config.extra.mult=40) while mult>0; end_of_round decrements a round counter and destroys the joker at 0; selling_jolly_card extends the round counter. Confidence medium because j.mult is the live run value (decrements at end_of_round) not a static field.

name: cry-mstack
accumulator: n; starts at 1, +1 each time sell_req (3) Jolly Jokers are sold
notes: repetition context with cardarea==G.play: gives min(retriggers, max_retriggers=40) extra retriggers to every scored card. j.n maps to card.ability.extra.retriggers. Confidence medium: retrigger count is run-accumulated; initial value is 1 per config.extra.retriggers.

name: cry-mneon
notes: end_of_round economy joker: accumulates money each round based on count of M-pool/Jolly jokers * bonus; pays out via calc_dollar_bonus. No scoring branch (no joker_main/individual/repetition/held).

name: cry-notebook
notes: Expands joker slot limit on reroll_shop (probabilistically or if enough Jolly Jokers present); resets eligibility each end_of_round. Purely a deck/joker-slot manipulation effect, no scoring branch.

name: cry-bonk
kotlin: val oj = ctx.otherJoker; if (oj != null) when (j.key) { "j_cry_bonk" -> { val isJolly = oj.key == "j_jolly" || oj.key.startsWith("j_cry_"); val chipAmt = if (isJolly) j.chips * 3.0 else j.chips; return Fx().apply { chipMod = chipAmt } } }
accumulator: chips; +bonus(1) each time a Pair (config.extra.type) is played, read as chips*xchips for jolly jokers or chips for non-jolly in other_joker branch
notes: other_joker context: gives chip_mod = chips*xchips to jolly jokers, chip_mod = chips to non-jolly jokers. Scaling (chips += bonus) happens in context.before when scoring_name==Pair — non-scoring. Confidence low: is_jolly() is a Lua method checking internal Cryptid tags; no direct FJoker field maps cleanly to it in the engine — approximation uses key prefix. config.extra.chips=6, xchips=3, bonus=1.

name: cry-loopy
kotlin:
// retrigger_joker_check guard in calcJoker:
"j_cry_loopy" -> if (j !== rj && j.n > 0) return Fx().apply { repetitions = minOf(j.n, 40) }
accumulator: n; increments when a Jolly Joker (j_jolly) is sold during the run — managed by the run loop, not Score.kt. Default 0 = no retriggers.
notes: Retriggers all other board jokers min(j.n, 40) times. j.n = Jolly Jokers sold this round (managed by run loop; Score.kt reads it). Self-excluded (j !== rj). Retrigger dispatch implemented; run-loop accumulator is out-of-scope for Score.kt.

name: cry-scrabble
notes: Fires in context.before (cardarea==G.jokers, before scoring): probabilistically (1 in 4) creates a Scrabble Tile joker. Purely a card-creation effect in the before context — no chips/mult/xmult output.

name: cry-sacrifice
notes: Fires on using_consumeable (Spectral cards only): creates jollies (3) Jolly Jokers and unc (1) copies of itself; resets at end_of_round. Purely a card-creation consumable-reaction effect — no scoring branch.

name: cry-reverse
notes: pre_discard economy: destroys itself and spawns Holo Jolly Jokers when the highlighted hand matches the configured type (Pair); no chips/mult/xmult contribution during evaluate_play

name: cry-doodlem
notes: setting_blind economy: creates Negative consumables (count = init + add * jolly_count); never fires during evaluate_play scoring cascade

name: cry-virgo
notes: before-hand scales card sell value via SMODS.scale_card when a Pair is played; selling_self spawns Polychrome Jolly Jokers; neither path contributes scoring Fx

name: cry-smallestm
notes: before-hand economy: adds a tag_cry_double_m Tag when scoring_name == Pair; no chips/mult contribution

name: cry-biggestm
accumulator: n; set to 1 by before-hand when scoring_name==Pair, reset to 0 at end_of_round
notes: X7 Mult when the toggle flag is active (set in context.before when hand is Pair, cleared at end_of_round); j.n used as 0/1 boolean flag for card.ability.extra.check; x_mult=7 from config.extra

name: cry-mprime
kotlin: if (oj !== j && (oj.key == "j_jolly" || oj.rarity == "cry_m")) return Fx().apply { eMult = j.mult }
accumulator: mult; starts at 1.05 (config.extra.mult), increases by +0.04 (config.extra.bonus) each time a Jolly Joker is sold (selling_card context)
notes: Emult_mod = extra.mult (starts 1.05, scales +0.04 per Jolly sold) applied to every adjacent M/Jolly joker; engine FJoker has no is_jolly() or pool membership check so the pool guard is best-effort using oj.key/oj.rarity; scaling happens in selling_card not during scoring

name: cry-Macabre Joker
notes: setting_blind economy: destroys all non-M, non-Jolly, non-eternal jokers and replaces each with one Jolly Joker; never fires during evaluate_play

name: cry-megg
notes: end_of_round scales internal amount counter; selling_self spawns floor(amount) Jolly Jokers (up to max_amount=200); no scoring path in evaluate_play

name: cry-longboi
accumulator: x; mirrors G.GAME.monstermult which starts at 1 and scales by +0.75 (config.extra.bonus) each end_of_round
notes: Xmult = extra.monster (global G.GAME.monstermult snapshot loaded at card creation) only fires when monster > 1; j.x used to hold the monster value since it is a run-global scaling accumulator; scaling happens at end_of_round not during scoring
